message:
fix: add missing BdCli arg to IsBeadActivelyWorked and restore installMockBd

The BdCli refactoring (589b8ffa) missed updating IsBeadActivelyWorked
internal call to getAgentBeadState, causing a build failure across 5
packages. Add defaultBdProvider package var (matching hasSession pattern)
and restore installMockBd test helper for the new BdCli architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
